title: Fig. 2 in Genotype diversity, phylogenetic analysis and seasonality of isolates of Acanthamoeba spp. in swimming pools in Kafrelsheikh, Egypt
author: El-Wakil, Eman S.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Fig. 2. The maximum-likelihood constructed phylogenetic tree of Acanthamoeba isolates inferred from the small subunit ribosomal RNA gene sequences from GenBank showing the phylogenetic position of three strains detected in the present study; T4 (blue), T9 (green) and T11 (red). The tree with the highest log likelihood (-1201.92) is shown.
steps_raw: Fig. 2. The maximum-likelihood constructed phylogenetic tree of Acanthamoeba isolates inferred from the small subunit ribosomal RNA gene sequences from GenBank showing the phylogenetic position of three strains detected in the present study; T4 (blue), T9 (green) and T11 (red). The tree with the highest log likelihood (-1201.92) is shown.
